node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Margin, ranking & metric objectives is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Preference learning and feeding downstream nodes such as Reward modeling, External retrieval & ranking, Support vector & kernel machines.

limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Preference learning.
